parsed_review.summary: CP00-649 (Risk C, 150 units, RP21.P02.M09.S13-RP21.P04.M02.S07) is a well-formed, descriptor-only, synthetic-only Admin Console review/closeout/API/UI pack. Read-only inspection confirms the pack binding, deliverable distribution (impl 57, claude_review 6, ui 17, failure_recovery 2, test 12, contract 35, security_audit 18, hermes_evidence 3), and micro_title distribution match the baseline exactly, and all phase/micro-phase counts sum to 150. The implementation (registry.js, service.js, validators.js) extends the established CP645-648 pattern consistently: createAdminConsoleCp649ReviewCloseoutApiUiDescriptor produces a descriptor with every runtime boundary false (admin/mutation/permission/audit/persistence/api/ui/hermes/claude), no_write_attestation injected via freezeCp649Result, and the validator enforces descriptor_only/runtime_execution/raw_payload guards plus opens_api_runtime/opens_contract_runtime/opens_ui_data_runtime=false and unauthorized_data_omitted=true. The contract file is in sync (runtime_opened=false everywhere, claude_final_approval_claimed=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false). Tests cover coverage, descriptor-only, evidence packets, handoff to CP00-650 at RP21.P04.M02.S08, and historical projection; command-evidence shows node --check/--test and rp21:admin-console:validate all exit 0. Authority boundaries hold: Claude remains a read-only reviewer that can block on P0/P1/P2 but is not final approver; Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic evidence/review-packet descriptors with no runtime receipt emitted; readiness auth preflight passed with well-formed JSON. The PENDING/false states in claude-review-result.json, construction-inspection.json, and adjudication.md are the expected pre-review state pending normalization of this receipt — the pack does NOT prematurely claim production_ready, runtime_ready, or enterprise trust (manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false). No P0/P1/P2 issues. Two P3 informational notes document the in-progress evidence state to be finalized by the closeout runner after this PASS. blocks_goal_closeout=false: nothing blocks this CP's closeout goal, and the pack makes no runtime/enterprise-trust claim that would require human final approval within this receipt.

findings.title: Command evidence captures RP21-scoped validation subset while pack is in_progress
findings.details: command-evidence.json records node --check (registry/service/validators/test/validate script), node --test packages/admin/test/model.test.js, node scripts/validate-rp21-admin-console-contract.mjs --write, and npm run rp21:admin-console:validate (all exit_code 0), but not the full closeout validation matrix listed as expected before closeout (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, npm run closeout-pack:validate, npm test, npm run validate, npm run spec:requirements:validate, npm run weighted:validate, npm run fullplan:validate, npm run goal:closeout:validate, npm run rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check). status is 'in_progress' and gate_outcome is 'pending_pack_evidence_completion', so this is the expected pre-finalization state, not a defect.
findings.recommendation: Ensure the closeout runner executes and records the full validation matrix after this review returns PASS and before flipping production_ready/admin_console_review_closeout_api_ui_descriptor_verified.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected by-design pre-closeout state; not blocking. Full matrix to be completed and recorded by the closeout runner at finalization.

findings.title: Review/inspection/adjudication artifacts are PENDING awaiting normalization of this receipt
findings.details: claude-review-result.json (overall_verdict PENDING, exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false), construction-inspection.json (verdict PENDING, production_ready=false, pack_level_claude_review_completed=false), and adjudication.md (P0-P3 pending) all show pending because this hardened read-only review is the missing input. Verified the pack does not prematurely claim readiness: manifest.json production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false, contract runtime_opened=false, and no_write_attestation.claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false. No overclaim detected.
findings.recommendation: Normalize this PASS receipt, record adjudication with P0-P3 all zero, then set the production_ready flag and queue regeneration per the standard hardened sequence (baseline, ready, run, normalize, receipt_validate).
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected pre-review state; confirms no premature production_ready or enterprise-trust claim. Finalize after this receipt is normalized and adjudicated.
